title: Dissolving the Deep Learning Sample Efficiency Gap
summary: Dissolving the Deep Learning Sample Efficiency Gap
whyItMatters: A common observation about deep learning is that it's wildly sample inefficient compared to humans. Deep learning systems appear to need much more real data or environment interaction to reach a given level of capability. A teenager can learn to drive in a few dozen hours; self-driving systems are trained for years on billions of miles of data. A human can…
